1733200.name: WRAITH OPS - Demo
1733200.description:
PROJECT WRAITH will always be a fun, clean, traditional FPS game. This will never change.

We're one of very few developers who offer a completely free of charge Steam demo showcasing what we've accomplished so far. We don't expect you to have blind faith in us, download and find out for yourself. Transparency is our biggest strength. Constant updates via our social media channels will ensure you're always in the know.

  • Large variety of exotic weapons and attachments to choose from.
  • Beautiful, well optimised maps with plenty of cover.
  • Realistic damage model. Drop people quickly, no tanking.
  • Solid netcode running at up to 90 tickrate.
  • Immersive, easy to pinpoint sound design, using WWise.
  • Good variety of game modes and ability to host Custom Servers.
  • Zero pay-to-win or aggressive, anti-player monetisation.

We're currently looking for feedback, which we'll be using to improve the game. This is really important to us. Want to take part in our Closed Alpha/Development process? Apply via our Discord to find out (link in the sidebar - click for free cookies).

There is an endless amount of times that we can shamelessly self plug, much to your annoyance. Seriously, how many times are we going to ask you to join our darn Discord server? Remember to wishlist Project Wraith to help us climb the ranks!
1733200.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
